core_metadata: Split by GEO SubSeries: GSE250487 biopsy scRNA-seq, GSE250488 blood scRNA-seq, GSE250490 biopsy CITE-seq. Study: Single-cell and spatial multi-omics highlight effects of anti-integrin therapy across cellular compartments in ulcerative colitis; 2024; DOI 10.1038/s41467-024-45665-6; PMID 38374043; UC plus healthy controls; blood and colon biopsy; Illumina NovaSeq 6000.
access_status: GEO processed/count objects public; submitter states raw files missing from GEO for privacy. dbGaP phs003502.v1.p1 provides controlled raw sequencing/phenotype access.
uncertainty_manual_review: Add as one study family, not separate independent cohorts. Use phs003502.v1.p1 as controlled-access companion accession, not a separate row unless registry explicitly separates controlled raw deposits. Spatial component is in publication, but GEO SubSeries listed here are scRNA/CITE-seq; spatial data linkage needs manual check.

core_metadata: Multi-omic characterisation of PBMCs in IBD; human PBMCs; 38 CD/UC patients; 10x droplet Multiome paired RNA+ATAC from same nuclei; RPMI/LPS/Salmonella stimulations; EGA dataset EGAD50000000198; Illumina NovaSeq 6000.
access_status: Controlled EGA access only; request via DAC EGAC00001003129; FASTQ plus VCF/phenotype-style files listed.
uncertainty_manual_review: Publication link not found in public EGA record or quick public search; set publication fields Unclear. EGA study says 38 patients and 80 stimulation samples, but dataset page lists 20 samples, so sample-size fields need conservative wording.

core_metadata: Spatial transcriptomics atlas of inflammatory bowel disease to guide implementation in research consortiums and clinical trials; 2026; human intestinal biopsies; CD, UC, non-diseased controls; Xenium spatial transcriptomics; 32 GEO samples; raw TAR 34.1 GB; platform GPL33762 Xenium In Situ Analyzer.
access_status: Public GEO raw/custom spatial files available.
uncertainty_manual_review: GEO record says citation missing even though Nature article appears public, so publication linkage should be manually confirmed before final row patch. Broader study compares CosMx and Xenium over 40 biopsies and more than 1.5M cells; GSE312420 alone is the Xenium component. Check sibling GSE312415 before final split.
